title: verbascum glandulosum
intro: Verbascum glandulosum, also known as the sticky mullein, is a biennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its tall stalks and large, sticky leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of saponins and mucilages, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum glandulosum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe respiratory issues, skin irritations, and wounds. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
